payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to 'Sara', which may be the same person as the existing 'Sara' or a different person with the same name. The relationship also directly conflicts if assumed to be the same entity.

details: Detected a direct conflict in family relationship.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided committing a superseding fact.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different Sara with the same name.
If it is the same Sara, ask which relationship is correct now.
If it is a different Sara, create a separate entity with a distinguishing label.
